title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sapphire Foods India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Sapphire Foods India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Sapphire Foods India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Sapphire Foods India:
Sapphire Foods India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sapphire Foods India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
